description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make an exclusive style statement with this Attivo watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to class-up your accessory collection! The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear.  Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case  Dial style: Black dial with silver hands  Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Date apeture on the dial, Ssteele branding on the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time   Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showering Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 33 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
